mapper.sql: t.id, t.delivery_record_id, t.order_id, t.delivery_appointment_id, t.delivery_status, t.delivery_mode, t.actual_delivery_time, t.delivery_place, t.delivery_store_code, t.receiver_name, t.receiver_mobile_encrypted, t.receiver_is_buyer, t.authorized_flag, t.authorized_proof_type, t.vehicle_vin, t.vehicle_mileage, t.delivery_remark, t.exception_remark, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_delivery_record t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_delivery_record t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_delivery_record t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_delivery_record ( delivery_record_id, order_id, delivery_appointment_id, delivery_status, delivery_mode, actual_delivery_time, delivery_place, delivery_store_code, receiver_name, receiver_mobile_encrypted, receiver_is_buyer, authorized_flag, authorized_proof_type, vehicle_vin, vehicle_mileage, delivery_remark, exception_remark, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{deliveryRecordId}, #{orderId}, #{deliveryAppointmentId}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryMode}, #{actualDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryPlace}, #{deliveryStoreCode}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverMobileEncrypted}, #{receiverIsBuyer}, #{authorizedFlag}, #{authorizedProofType}, #{vehicleVin}, #{vehicleMileage}, #{deliveryRemark}, #{exceptionRemark}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_delivery_record ( delivery_record_id, order_id, delivery_appointment_id, delivery_status, delivery_mode, actual_delivery_time, delivery_place, delivery_store_code, receiver_name, receiver_mobile_encrypted, receiver_is_buyer, authorized_flag, authorized_proof_type, vehicle_vin, vehicle_mileage, delivery_remark, exception_remark, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.deliveryRecordId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.deliveryAppointmentId}, #{item.deliveryStatus}, #{item.deliveryMode}, #{item.actualDeliveryTime}, #{item.deliveryPlace}, #{item.deliveryStoreCode}, #{item.receiverName}, #{item.receiverMobileEncrypted}, #{item.receiverIsBuyer}, #{item.authorizedFlag}, #{item.authorizedProofType}, #{item.vehicleVin}, #{item.vehicleMileage}, #{item.deliveryRemark}, #{item.exceptionRemark}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_delivery_record t SET
t.delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus},
t.actual_delivery_time = #{actualDeliveryTime},
t.delivery_remark = #{deliveryRemark},
t.exception_remark = #{exceptionRemark},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_delivery_record t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
